## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Navigate to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

## Environment

- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 18.19]
- **Python version**: [e.g., 3.10.12]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to illustrate the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (logs, configuration, etc.).
